path: Problem: Sum values across a row/columns only for periods that are on/after a threshold period (e.g., future weeks from the current week)
Action: Use SUMIF to conditionally aggregate a value range based on a parallel header/criteria range

Observation: When the criteria (week numbers/dates) are stored in a single header row aligned with the values to sum, SUMIF can replace many repeated IF additions by applying one condition across the entire span
